text:
Thief (, rom. Shīfu) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to steal a random card from the target player's designated slots.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This attack spell steals a random card from the target's binder. It is only capable of stealing a card from the restricted slots and will not work on the player's free slots. Since this card steals a card completely at random, the card received may be useful or useless. It only works when the caster is within a close proximity to the target player.

|-
![Eng]
|No.1007 :: Thief 
Can steal a random card from the Specific Pocket Cards from another named player.
|}

Trivia

Degiro uses this card to steal Sword of Truth from Gon and Killua in Chapter 133, unsuccessfully.
The card's first appearance in the Hunter × Hunter 2011 remake is Episode 62.
